close_reason: Cleanup complete - updated tests for new majority quorum model
description:
## Goal
Add new tests for the majority quorum recovery model.

## Files
`test/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/`

## New Tests to Add
- Majority quorum validation (pass/fail scenarios)
- Version vector computation from multiple logs
- Shard-filtered coalescing in log replay
- End-to-end reconnect scenario

## Verification
```bash
mix test test/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/

rm -rf $TMPDIR/bedrock_99999 $TMPDIR/bedrock_debug_cluster
mix run scripts/debug_cluster.exs --scenario=reconnect --timeout=30000
```

Note: Old test removal is handled by bedrock-awr3 (cleanup task).
title: Update recovery tests for majority quorum model
